creator: pmc@citylink.dinoex.sub.org
text:
(In reply to Eugene Grosbein from comment #16)

Yes and yes. One of two crashes wrote a dump (the other just went stuck).
I looked at the backtrace, found it leading right into the functions we're
dealing with, and deleted it in a mood of frustration. So sadly no backup.

It was a custom production kernel for a very small KVM, no INVARIANTS
or such. And it doesn't normally crash.
